testsuite.name: tests.PositiveLambdaTest

testcase.name: Заполнение всех полей формы студента, и проверка на соответствие

failure.message: Invalid element state [#submit]: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1285, 517). Other element would receive the click: ... Screenshot: file:/D:/Kr.Tech/guru/guru.qa.HW-11_Jenkins_UI/build/reports/tests/1775804645416.0.png Page source: file:/D:/Kr.Tech/guru/guru.qa.HW-11_Jenkins_UI/build/reports/tests/1775804645416.0.html Timeout: 4 s. Caused by: ElementClickInterceptedException: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1285, 517). Other element would receive the click: ...
